state_file.why: state file anchors the current run truth

repair_packet.why: repair packet anchors the continuation contract

repair_receipt.why: repair receipt from_state does not match the repair packet contour

repair_history_chain.why: repair history chain is ignored because the repair receipt contour is not trusted

decision_trace.resolution_rule: repair_packet resumability wins because it is the stricter continuation contract; repair_receipt can only fill a missing packet value
decision_trace.why: the repair packet already names resumability for the active contour

decision_trace.resolution_rule: repair_packet resumability family wins; repair_receipt can only fill a missing family label
decision_trace.why: the repair packet already names the resumability family

decision_trace.resolution_rule: repair_packet termination wins; repair_receipt can only surface a missing non-resumable boundary signal
decision_trace.why: the repair packet already carries the current termination truth

decision_trace.resolution_rule: repair_packet current step wins; repair_receipt and repair_history_chain only fill the gap when the packet does not name a current step
decision_trace.why: no source could name the active continuation step

decision_trace.resolution_rule: repair_packet required inputs win; repair_receipt can only fill them when the packet leaves them empty
decision_trace.why: the repair packet already names the required inputs for the active continuation step

decision_trace.resolution_rule: repair_packet missing inputs anchor continuation readiness because state and receipt do not carry a stronger missing-input contract
decision_trace.why: the repair packet remains the authoritative source for current missing continuation inputs

decision_trace.resolution_rule: repair_receipt can refine operator focus for the same contour and step; otherwise the packet focus remains authoritative
decision_trace.why: no source could name the operator focus

decision_trace.chosen_value: restore from the last trusted fallback before continuing
